programme.title: The Dog House
programme.desc: The kennel takes a shot on Bulut, a stray Malinois who showed up in the night. Can Bailey the cocker spaniel meet expectations? And is it second time lucky for Moose the Staffy.

programme.title: Your Song
programme.desc: Alison Hammond hosts the new series giving extraordinary people a chance to perform the one song that tells their story. In Liverpool, a teen sings Bocelli for his foster mum.

programme.title: The Great Celebrity Bake Off for Stand Up To Cancer
programme.desc: Emmett J Scanlan, Mark Wright, Nella Rose, Mutya Buena and Ralf Little make vegan fruit tarts and recreate their most ridiculous purchase ever.

programme.title: Gogglebox
programme.desc: The Goggleboxers settle in for I'm a Celebrity... South Africa, Britain's Got Talent, The Dog House, The Apprentice, Secret Garden and the news on the Artemis II moon mission.

programme.title: Gogglebox
programme.desc: The Goggleboxers check out all the best TV from early 2025 in this special episode.

programme.title: The Disappearance of Jay Slater
programme.desc: Within hours of Jay Slater's disappearance in the summer of 2024, mass online interest set conspiracy theories flying. This is the exclusive story of Jay's death and its extreme aftermath.

programme.title: The Copenhagen Test
programme.desc: Spy thriller with Simu Liu. With his fake life up and running, Alexander must decide if he's willing to sacrifice a real mission in order to hunt down the hackers.

programme.title: The Copenhagen Test
programme.desc: Spy thriller. In a mission where nothing is as it seems, will Alexander risk his own life to save another? Meanwhile, Michelle gets a visit from the past.

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: Teleshopping.

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: Teleshopping.

programme.title: George Clarke's Old House New Home
programme.desc: In Weston-super-Mare, can two novice renovators completely transform a dilapidated Georgian-style house that's divided into flats, for just £40k.

programme.title: Matt Baker: Travels with Mum & Dad
programme.desc: The Bakers find some wonderful objects in Beamish Open-Air Museum's storerooms, and Matt gets a crash course in driving a 1900s tram.

programme.title: A New Life in the Sun
programme.desc: A VIP visits Paul and Fiona's villa in France. In Italy, Summer and Ashley decide to take on even more work. And in Portugal, Louise and Shay look for a new start.

programme.title: Jasmine Harman's Renovation in
programme.desc: Almost a year after Jasmine and Jon started to renovate their villa, the basement's taking shape, the gym's complete, and the end is finally in sight.

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Paul and Zung from Kent are about to realise their dream of moving to the Dordogne in France. Ben Hillman lines up five of the region's most stunning properties for their £300,000 budget.

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Marcia and Ron love Crete's climate, beautiful beaches and the friendly people, and dream of owning a holiday home there. Can Lee Juggurnauth make their wishes a reality for their £255k.

programme.title: Chateau DIY
programme.desc: Jon and Carmen give their tired courtyard a full facelift. Can Jane and Rory finish their dilapidated gîte renovation before summer to avoid losing paying guests and vital income.

programme.title: Kirstie and Phil's Love It or List It
programme.desc: Brilliant Builds: Kirstie and Phil look back at how Carol and Andrew balanced house and garden to create a multigenerational space in their troublesome three-bed in Harrogate.

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Divorce lawyer Michelle Camacho takes her guests back to the 1970s with a retro menu of duck a l'orange, psychedelic coleslaw, groovy veg and a Bloody Mary sorbet.

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Pub manager and artist Matt Wren struggles with disasters in the kitchen. Meanwhile, two of his guests get into an argument and the other pair make eyes at each other.

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Print manager and live wire Licia Snow plans a laid-back evening with a few rustic and homely touches. But can she resist the urge to bicker with Michelle.

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Trainee solicitor Raphael Steele hosts his first-ever dinner party with an ambitious Caribbean menu of ackee, saltfish and curried goat, and steelpan entertainment.

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Swedish businesswoman Charlotte Sundberg hosts the final night. Can an evening of schnapps, Swedish folk singing and classic Swedish cuisine win her the prize.

programme.title: Primark vs John Lewis: Battle of the Brands
programme.desc: It's a contest of penny-pinching power versus posh polish. From homeware to beauty to online, how did Primark's bargains muscle in on John Lewis's bougie turf.

programme.title: Help! I Bought It at Auction with Sarah Beeny
programme.desc: In Herne Bay, Leezac hopes to create a modern home on a modest budget, but a steel beam's causing problems. Alice hits a brick wall with her Somerset townhouse.

programme.title: Jumanji: Welcome to the Jungle
programme.desc: Fantasy adventure sequel with Dwayne Johnson, Karen Gillan, Kevin Hart and Jack Black. Four teenagers are sucked into the Jumanji video game to complete a dangerous quest.

programme.title: Transformers: Rise of the Beasts
programme.desc: Seventh instalment in the frenetic sci-fi franchise. The Maximals - part animal, part robot - join the Autobots to battle against planet-munching Unicron and his Terrorcon cronies.

programme.title: Naked Attraction
programme.desc: Married couple Abbie and Charlie are missing one thing from their family: a woman to turn them into a throuple. And glamour puss Chrissie is looking for husband number four.

programme.title: Taskmaster
programme.desc: Amy Gledhill, Armando Iannucci, Joanna Page, Joel Dommett and Kumail Nanjiani leave all dignity at the door as they hunt for worms and feed Greg his five-a-day.

programme.title: Gogglebox
programme.desc: The Goggleboxers settle in for I'm a Celebrity... South Africa, Britain's Got Talent, The Dog House, The Apprentice, Secret Garden and the news on the Artemis II moon mission.

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: Teleshopping.

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: Teleshopping.

programme.title: George Clarke's Old House New Home
programme.desc: George squeezes into an Edwardian workers cottage that's only half the size of a squash court, and visits a house with overwhelmingly Italian décor.

programme.title: Matt Baker: Travels with Mum & Dad
programme.desc: The Bakers head to the World Heritage listed Durham Cathedral. Matt goes on an underwater treasure hunt and the whole family try out as choristers.

programme.title: A New Life in the Sun: Where Are They Now?
programme.desc: We revisit Adam and Alicia at their cocktail bar on the Costa del Sol. Coach tour operator Leslie trials new Spanish culinary experiences.

programme.title: Jasmine Harman's Renovation in the Sun
programme.desc: With the kitchen totally demolished and the new one arriving in just a week, panic sets in. And as the builders work hard, the sun terraces get some finishing touches.

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Tina loves France and wants to buy a holiday home she can one day retire to. Can Danni Menzies find her and her daughter Clare the perfect property on the beautiful Cote de Béziers.

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Martin and Mandy want to make the permanent move to Mayenne in France. Can Jean Johansson find them, their three motorbikes and two prized parrots their forever home for £50k.

programme.title: Chateau DIY
programme.desc: Ben and Billie embark on a dramatic two-bedroom apartment makeover for a Valentine's Day event. Nick and Nicole battle to turn a crumbling façade into a striking showpiece.

programme.title: Kirstie and Phil's Love It or
programme.desc: List It: Brilliant Builds: Kirstie and Phil look back at one of their biggest builds - Paul and Dawn's higgledy-piggledy Huddersfield home - where Kirstie got the sledgehammer out.

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: The first host is 23-year-old trainee accountant Annika, a self-confessed hippy and hunter-gatherer. Will her love of game spoil her chances.

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Katy, who loves a competition, is convinced that she can win with her super-organised approach and 'prize-winning' cuisine. But she clashes with Carolyn.

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Adrian plans a night of spicy food and surprises. But will his dessert served in a hot tub be a damp squib.

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Polish-born Sylwia takes her guests on a culinary tour of all the places where she's lived in the world. But how will her European line dancing go down.

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: With all of her guests out for revenge, Carolyn plans a charm offensive. Can she achieve one of the biggest turnarounds in Come Dine with Me history.

programme.title: George Clarke's Amazing Spaces
programme.desc: George Clarke meets a master craftsman who's rescuing a dilapidated Victorian circus wagon, and a man with an ambitious plan to turn a grain silo into a hip, rustic bar.

programme.title: The Great Celebrity Bake Off for Stand Up To Cancer
programme.desc: Emmett J Scanlan, Mark Wright, Nella Rose, Mutya Buena and Ralf Little make vegan fruit tarts and recreate their most ridiculous purchase ever.
